arts.ttl: Arsenal 'prepared' to make move for Jonathan David as Arteta defends tactics
arts.sum: "It’s a great opportunity for any player to show what they are doing in the games if they didn’t get the chance to play yet," Arteta said when asked about youngsters being handed a chance. After holding Manchester City to a 2-2 draw in the Premier League on Sunday, the Gunners can go into tonight's game with the opportunity to rest a number of key players.

arts.ttl: We simulated Arsenal vs Bolton to get a Carabao Cup score prediction
arts.sum: Arsenal will play their first game at home in over three weeks later today when the Gunners take on League One side Bolton in the Carabao Cup third round. Arsenal were awarded a penalty after just four minutes at the Emirates when Gabriel was hauled down in the box from a corner, and Bukayo Saka stepped up to take, sending the 'keeper the wrong way to make it 1-0 early on.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly start, big David Raya decision - Arsenal predicted XI vs Bolton - football.london
arts.sum: football.london takes a look at how the Gunners could line up for their Carabao Cup clash with Bolton Wanderers at Emirates Stadium After an eventful weekend, Arsenal can turn their attention to the Carabao Cup when they take on Bolton Wanderers on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Bolton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Bolton Wanderers in the third round as the Gunners begin their Carabao Cup campaign on Wednesday night. Mikel Arteta’s team have a short turnaround from Sunday’s thrilling draw at Manchester City, where the North London side were a last-gasp equaliser away from three points, despite playing the entire second half with 10 men.
